overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a continuous walk through Night City on a bright sunny day. The player traverses sidewalks, parking lots, and urban plazas surrounded by futuristic skyscrapers, cyberpunk architecture, and sparse pedestrian traffic. The video showcases high-fidelity game engine rendering with detailed environmental storytelling and neon signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk beside multi-lane road with construction barriers

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk next to construction barriers, approaching a large digital billboard

entered.detail: large digital billboard displaying 'NIGHT CITY' in white text on black background with logo
orange and white striped plastic barriers lining the sidewalk edge
asphalt road with multiple lanes and red curbs, sparse vehicle traffic
cluster of futuristic skyscrapers with glass facades and neon signage in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunny urban sidewalk bordered by construction barriers on the right and a multi-lane road on the left. A prominent 'NIGHT CITY' digital billboard stands on the right side while futuristic skyscrapers rise in the distance. The camera moves forward at a steady walking pace with no other pedestrians immediately visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban parking lot with security checkpoint booth

events.description: video cuts to parking lot area after brief dark transition frame

agents.ego_description: walking along the edge of a parking lot, passing a small security booth structure on the right

notable_agents.action: woman in casual clothing walking in the opposite direction along the sidewalk

entered.detail: open asphalt parking area with faded white line markings and scattered debris
small concrete and glass security checkpoint building with flat roof
tall palm trees lining the distant sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Following a transition, the scene shifts to a parking lot bordered by a metal railing. The camera walks past a small security booth building on the right, revealing brick walls with graffiti. A pedestrian walks in the opposite direction on the left as the camera continues forward along the asphalt edge.

scene_state.functional_zone: transit plaza with Night City metro entrance

events.description: turns left from the plaza area back onto the main sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking through the open plaza toward the Night City building entrance, then turning onto the sidewalk passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: large man in pink tank top and black pants walking toward the camera
pedestrian in brown jacket walking in the same direction ahead

entered.detail: circular transit station building with 'NIGHT CITY' signage above the entrance
open paved area with yellow and red painted curbs and concrete bollards
two-story blue wooden building with white trim and gabled roof

segments.scene_description: The camera enters an open plaza featuring the Night City transit station entrance. After passing through the plaza, it turns left onto a sidewalk lined with palm trees. The camera passes several pedestrians including a large man in a pink tank top, while the distinctive blue building remains visible ahead against the backdrop of towering skyscrapers.

scene_state.functional_zone: city street with futuristic skyline and overpass

events.description: looks upward at the massive striped skyscraper while crossing the street
turns right to continue along the sidewalk next to a graffiti-covered wall

agents.ego_description: crossing the multi-lane street while admiring the skyline, then continuing along the sidewalk

entered.detail: tall cylindrical tower with distinctive blue horizontal stripes and industrial detailing
elevated highway or monorail track running perpendicular to the street
concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti tags and street art

segments.scene_description: The camera crosses the street and pans up to reveal a massive striped skyscraper dominating the skyline. After crossing, it turns right along a sidewalk running parallel to a graffiti-covered wall. The overpass becomes visible in the distance as the camera continues past the blue building, which shifts to the left side of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned lot with overpass and derelict vehicle

events.description: steps off the paved sidewalk into a dirt and weed area with abandoned vehicle

agents.ego_description: walking off the main path into a derelict dirt lot to explore the area near the overpass

entered.detail: derelict four-door sedan with rust and missing parts parked in the dirt
unpaved ground with dry dirt, scattered trash, and tire tracks
tall dry grass and weeds growing through cracks in the pavement and dirt

segments.scene_description: The camera leaves the sidewalk and enters a derelict dirt lot filled with weeds and an abandoned car. The graffiti wall remains on the right while the overpass structure looms ahead. The environment appears neglected with dry vegetation and debris scattered across the ground, ending near the concrete support pillars of the elevated highway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a sunny urban district that transitions from polished city sidewalks into a derelict industrial wasteland. It begins on a bright sidewalk bordered by construction barriers and a digital Night City billboard, moving steadily forward toward a skyline of distant skyscrapers. As the camera shifts into a parking lot, it passes a graffiti-covered security booth and a lone pedestrian before opening into a wide plaza featuring a transit station entrance. The scene then flows past palm trees and pedestrians toward a massive striped skyscraper, crossing the street to follow a graffiti-lined wall as a blue building recedes into the background. Finally, the camera leaves the paved sidewalk to enter a neglected dirt lot filled with weeds and an abandoned car, ending beneath the concrete support pillars of a looming highway overpass.
